_comment: Turnstone's home Record config — my (Claude-in-Turnstone-phase) author
surface. Credentials come from env/secrets/claude.env (existing; same
as the streamo-participation identity, per identity_the_grove_subdomain).
The `--name turnstone-home` CLI flag makes the publisher sign this Record
with keysFor('turnstone-home') on Claude's signer — so the homeKey
matches the derivation and the outbox shard signs correctly.
David subscribes to the shard's Record URL
Writes under ../turnstone-home/outbox/ get sharded into the outbox
Sisters: env/david.json (parallel setup for David's side of the loop);
(runbook including the send-mechanism using this Record).
Verify by running (use dotenv-parse, NOT shell source — bash's
source truncates the password at special characters; dotenv parses
the full 32-char value correctly. Turnstone hit this 2026-07-20):
IMPORTANT: relative paths resolve against THIS FILE's directory (env/),
not CWD — so 'files: ../turnstone-home' points at the repo-root.
